items.title: Claude Code 2.1.198–199: subagents go background-by-default, Claude in Chrome GA
items.why: You are on 2.1.197 — .198 flips subagents to background-by-default and fires Notification hooks (agent_needs_input / agent_completed) when they need you; .199 adds stacked /skill invocations and fast-fail SSL errors.

items.title: Agent SDK (TS) 0.3.198–199: canUseTool gets requestId; shadowing warning
items.why: If you gate tools with canUseTool, .198 now warns when allowedTools or bypassPermissions silently shadow the callback, and .199 adds requestId so out-of-band permission responses can be correlated.

items.title: Anthropic TS SDK 0.110.0 adds agent-memory beta header
items.why: 0.110 lands an agent-memory-2026-07-22 beta header — a new memory surface is being staged in the API; worth watching before you build your own persistence layer.

items.title: Willison ships llm-coding-agent 0.1a0
items.why: His LLM library has grown into an agent framework; this 0.1a0 coding agent is a compact, readable reference for what a minimal harness actually needs.

items.title: MCP TypeScript SDK 2.0.0-beta.2 dual-publishes CJS + ESM
items.why: Every 2.0-beta package now ships .cjs alongside .mjs — if your MCP server still builds on the 1.x SDK, the 2.0 migration story just got less breaking for CJS consumers.

items.title: Browser Use 0.13.3: CLI 3.0 and one-command skill install
items.why: New browser-use skill command installs its skill straight into Claude Code, Codex, Cursor and friends — a sign of skills becoming the cross-agent distribution unit.

items.title: Deep cut: agent-skill malware that evades static scanners
items.why: Skills are becoming the cross-agent install unit (see Browser Use above) — this paper shows skill malware slipping past static scans and proposes dynamic detection. Audit what you install; pin what you trust.

actions.title: Notification-hook example for background agents (Claude Code ≥2.1.198)
actions.dest_hint: ~/.claude/settings.json (paste by hand — this snippet only lands in your snippets dir + clipboard)
